channel.title: Imagination Technologies — recent CVEs
channel.description: Most recent CVEs assigned by Imagination Technologies (imaginationtech).

item.title: CVE-2026-34194 · 7.1 HIGH — GPU DDK - UAF read and/or write to arbitrary physical pages in DevmemIntChangeSparse due to incorrect calculation of the virtual index count
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to cause mismanagement of a mapping state maintained for a sparse memory allocation. The product accidentally refers to the wrong memory due to the semantics of…

item.title: CVE-2026-22164 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GPU DDK - Kernel heap OOB write in DevmemIntComputeVirtualIndicesFromLogical
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to corrupt kernel heap memory. By creating resources of certain types and presenting a set of parameters to the affected interface the exploit can be used to co…

item.title: CVE-2026-34193 · 4.3 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - Arbitrary write via UFO updates due insufficient pointer validation in rgxfw_to_ptr()
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest/Host VM may post improper commands to the GPU Firmware to trigger a write of data outside the intended GPU memory. A logic error in the address translation allowed a compromised Host (Kernel) to pe…

item.title: CVE-2026-22166 · 8.1 HIGH — GPU DDK - Write UAF in KEGLGetPoolBuffers, WebGL reachable
item.description: A web page that contains unusual WebGPU content loaded into the GPU GLES render process and can trigger write UAF crash in the GPU GLES user-space shared library. On certain platforms, when the process executing graphics workload has system privilege…

item.title: CVE-2026-22165 · 8.1 HIGH — GPU DDK - UAF read of GLES3Context::psDrawParams and GLES3Context::psMode and UAF read/write of RMJob::apsCCBs
item.description: A web page that contains unusual WebGPU content loaded into the GPU GLES render process and can trigger a write UAF crash in the GPU GLES user-space shared library. On certain platforms, when the process executing graphics workload has system privile…

item.title: CVE-2026-22167 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Cache resident PM buffers writable by other GPU requestors, leading to arbitrary write to physical memory
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to force GPU to write to arbitrary physical memory pages. Under certain circumstances this exploit could be used to corrupt data pages not allocated by the GPU…

item.title: CVE-2026-21733 · 7.3 HIGH — RESERVED
item.description: Vulnerability in Imagination Technologies Graphics DDK on Linux, Android -- RESERVED

item.title: CVE-2026-22163 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Unsafe writing of MMU PT entries on systems with 32-bit host CPU
item.description: Requires malware code to misuse the DDK kernel module IOCTL interface. Such code can use the interface in an unsupported way that allows subversion of the GPU to perform writes to arbitrary physical memory pages. The product utilises a shared resourc…

item.title: CVE-2026-21732 · 9.6 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GPU DDK - libusc OOB write at ConvertSwitchToArrayLookupBP during WebGPU shader compilation
item.description: A web page that contains unusual GPU shader code is loaded into the GPU compiler process and can trigger a write out-of-bounds write crash in the GPU shader compiler library. On certain platforms, when the compiler process has system privileges this…

item.title: CVE-2026-21736 · 4.4 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - Insufficient permission check in PhysmemWrapExtMem() when write attribute support enabled
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to gain write permission to read-only wrapped user-mode memory. This is caused by improper handling of the memory protections for the user-mode wrapped memory r…

item.title: CVE-2025-13952 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GPU DDK - libusc UAF via WebGPU shaders at MergeConsecutiveBarriersBP
item.description: A web page that contains unusual GPU shader code is loaded from the Internet into the GPU compiler process triggers a write use-after-free crash in the GPU shader compiler library. On certain platforms, when the compiler process has system privileges…

item.title: CVE-2025-10865 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - DevmemIntGetReservationData does not ref the PMR it returns
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to cause mismanagement of reference counting to cause a potential use after free. Improper reference counting on an internal resource caused scenario where pote…

item.title: CVE-2025-58411 · 8.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Reservation::psMappedPMR can change while used by a freelist -> UAF
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to cause mismanagement of resources reference counting creating a potential use after free scenario. Improper resource management and reference counting on an i…

item.title: CVE-2025-58409 · 3.5 LOW — GPU DDK - Disguised freelist buffers passed to RGXCreateHWRTDataSet can cause arbitrary physical memory writes corrupting memory
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to subvert GPU HW to write to arbitrary physical memory pages. Under certain circumstances this exploit could be used to corrupt data pages not allocated by the…

item.title: CVE-2025-25176 · 9.1 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GPU DDK - GPU Register value contents leaked from secure workloads to non-secure world
item.description: Intermediate register values of secure workloads can be exfiltrated in workloads scheduled from applications running in the non-secure environment of a platform.

item.title: CVE-2025-58408 · 5.9 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - KASAN Read UAF in the PVRSRVBridgeRGXSubmitTransfer2 due to improper error handling code
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger reads of stale data that can lead to kernel exceptions and write use-after-free. The Use After Free common weakness enumeration was chosen as the sta…

item.title: CVE-2025-58407 · 7.4 HIGH 🌩️ — GPU DDK - TOCTOU bug affecting psFWMemContext->uiPageCatBaseRegSet
item.description: Kernel or driver software installed on a Guest VM may post improper commands to the GPU Firmware to exploit a TOCTOU race condition and trigger a read and/or write of data outside the allotted memory escaping the virtual machine.

item.title: CVE-2025-58410 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GPU DDK - Multiple calls into PhysmemGEMPrimeExport can inherit write access permission for an existing read-only dma_buf import PMR
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to gain write permissions to memory buffers exported as read-only. This is caused by improper handling of the memory protections for the buffer resource.

item.title: CVE-2025-46711 · 5.5 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - NULL Pointer dereference occurs in LockHandle on bridge entry when connection misused
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger NULL pointer dereference kernel exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2025-25177 · 5.1 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - Roll-back of pvr_exp_fence not in finalised state can cause UAF
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger use-after-free kernel exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2025-46709 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GPU DDK - Security fix for PP-171570 can lead to an uninitialised pointer dereference and memory leak
item.description: Possible memory leak or kernel exceptions caused by reading kernel heap data after free or NULL pointer dereference kernel exception.

item.title: CVE-2025-6573 · 9.8 CRITICAL 🌩️ — GPU DDK - RGXFW_CTL.pui8FWScratchBuf Leak/Overwrite
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside an untrusted/rich execution environment (REE) could leak information from the trusted execution environment (TEE).

item.title: CVE-2025-8109 · 8.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - GPU shader shared memory corrupted using ptrace to disrupt GPU operation
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct ptrace system calls to issue writes to GPU origin read only memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-25180 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Insufficient validation in RGXCREATEFREELIST creates corrupt freelist
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to subvert GPU HW to write to arbitrary physical memory pages. Under certain circumstances this exploit could be used to corrupt data pages not allocated by the…

item.title: CVE-2025-46708 · 4.3 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - Guest VM can delay the FW and GPU from processing workloads from other VMs
item.description: Software installed and running inside a Guest VM may conduct improper GPU system calls to prevent other Guests from running work on the GPU.

item.title: CVE-2025-46707 · 5.2 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - Guest VM can override its own FW VZ connection state after the FW has close it
item.description: Software installed and running inside a Guest VM may override Firmware's state and gain access to the GPU.

item.title: CVE-2025-46710 · 5.7 MEDIUM
item.description: Possible kernel exceptions caused by reading and writing kernel heap data after free.

item.title: CVE-2025-25179 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Freelist GPU VA can be remapped to another reservation/PMR to trigger GPU arbitrary write to physical memory
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to subvert GPU HW to write to arbitrary physical memory pages.

item.title: CVE-2024-47893 · 6.5 MEDIUM 🌩️ — GPU DDK - OOB read and write of the shared KMD/FW memory heap (VZ/TEE setups)
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may exploit memory shared with the GPU Firmware to read and/or write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-1706 · 7.5 HIGH 🌩️ — GPU DDK - Improper locking when accessing the pvr_exp_fence object
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger use-after-free kernel exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2025-0467 · 8.2 HIGH — GPU DDK - rgxfw_hwperf_get_packet_buffer OOB write
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may exploit memory shared with the GPU Firmware to write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-25178 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - PhysmemWrapExtMem uiSize=0 corrupts kernel memory
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to cause kernel system memory corruption.

item.title: CVE-2025-0468 · 7.1 HIGH — GPU DDK - ui64RobustnessAddress can overwrite Freelist / HWRT (and bypass PMMETA)
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to subvert GPU HW to write to arbitrary physical memory pages. Under certain circumstances this exploit could be used to corrupt data pages not allocated by the…

item.title: CVE-2025-0835 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - _WrapExtMemReleasePages called twice if _FlushUMVirtualRange fails
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to corrupt kernel heap memory.

item.title: CVE-2025-0478 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - PMMETA_PROTECT PMR can be exported as dma-buf file / GEM object
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to issue reads and writes to arbitrary physical memory pages. Under certain circumstances this exploit could be used to corrupt data pages not allocated by the…

item.title: CVE-2024-12837 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Exploitable kernel double free on apsFenceSyncCheckpoints allocated with arbitrary size
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to corrupt kernel heap memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-12576 · 5.5 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - Untrusted app can crash firmware by forcing MCU access to non-aligned address
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger a crash of the FW running on the GPU freezing graphics output.

item.title: CVE-2024-12577 · 7.3 HIGH — GPU DDK - rgxfw_pcset_ungrab OOB write via psFWMemContext->uiPageCatBaseRegSet
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may exploit memory shared with the GPU Firmware to write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-52939 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - RGXFWIF_HWPERF_CTL_BLK.uiNumCounters OOB write
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may post improper commands to the GPU Firmware to trigger a write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-47896 · 3.3 LOW — GPU DDK - rgxfw_hwr_log_info OOB write via psHWRInfoBuf->ui32WriteIndex
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may exploit memory shared with the GPU Firmware to write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-46975 · 7.9 HIGH — GPU DDK - rgxfw_write_robustness_buffer allows arbitrary catreg set mapping
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may exploit memory shared with the GPU Firmware to write data into another Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-47900 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Multiple integer overflow in DmaTransfer PMR_DevPhysAddr functions leading to OOB writes
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to access OOB kernel memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-47899 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - PVRSRVDeviceServicesOpen use-after-free condition
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger use-after-free kernel exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2024-47898 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - PVRSRVDeviceSyncOpen use-after-free condition
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger use-after-free kernel exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2024-47891 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Exploitable double free on PTL_STREAM_DESC object in the kernel function TLServerCloseStreamKM due to a race condition
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper GPU system calls to trigger use-after-free kernel exceptions.

item.title: CVE-2024-46974 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - Arbitrary write of read-only dmabuf
item.description: Software installed and run as a non-privileged user may conduct improper read/write operations on imported/exported DMA buffers.

item.title: CVE-2024-52938 · 7.8 HIGH — GPU DDK - rgxfw_pm_add_freelist_for_reconstruction OOB write
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may post improper commands to the GPU Firmware to subvert reconstruction activities to trigger a write of data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-52937 · 6.7 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - rgxfw_kernel_CMD_DISABLE_ZSSTORE OOB write via ui32WriteOffsetOfDisableZSStore
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may exploit memory shared with the GPU Firmware to write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-52936 · 4.4 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - rgxfw_hwperf_config OOB read & write
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may post improper commands to the GPU Firmware to write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.

item.title: CVE-2024-52935 · 4.1 MEDIUM — GPU DDK - psContext->eDM gives OOB write
item.description: Kernel software installed and running inside a Guest VM may exploit memory shared with the GPU Firmware to write data outside the Guest's virtualised GPU memory.
